new_tasks.title: Build temporally coherent dense BFMCS
new_tasks.description: Create a complete BFMCS (DovetailedTimelineQuot root_mcs root_mcs_proof) structure with proven temporally_coherent field. The existing DovetailedTimelineQuotBFMCS module provides modal saturation via closedFlags, but does NOT construct a full BFMCS type with temporal coherence. This task must: (1) Define dovetailedTimelineQuotBFMCS as a proper BFMCS structure with families indexed by DovetailedTimelineQuot, (2) Prove dovetailedTimelineQuotBFMCS_temporally_coherent by lifting the existing dovetailedFMCS_forward_F and dovetailedFMCS_backward_P proofs to all families in the bundle. Use the DirectMultiFamilyBFMCS pattern from the discrete case as a template.

new_tasks.title: Wire dense truth lemma instantiation
new_tasks.description: Instantiate parametric_shifted_truth_lemma at D = DovetailedTimelineQuot and close the sorry in timelineQuot_not_valid_of_neg_consistent at TimelineQuotCompleteness.lean:127. This requires: (1) Use the temporally coherent BFMCS from the dependency task, (2) Construct ParametricCanonicalTaskModel (DovetailedTimelineQuot ...) and ShiftClosedParametricCanonicalOmega B, (3) Connect root MCS membership (phi.neg in M0) to semantic falsity (not valid_over D phi), (4) Close the sorry that blocks dense_completeness_theorem. The implementation should follow the pattern from DiscreteInstantiation.lean for the discrete case.

analysis_summary: dense_completeness_theorem is blocked because timelineQuot_not_valid_of_neg_consistent has a sorry requiring parametric truth lemma instantiation at D=DovetailedTimelineQuot. This requires (1) a temporally coherent BFMCS over DovetailedTimelineQuot, and (2) wiring that BFMCS into the truth lemma. Two tasks proposed: first builds the BFMCS with temporal coherence, second wires the truth lemma.
